name: aura-premium-ecommerce
description: Unified launcher for premium E-Commerce web application

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install-backend && npm run install-frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "cd backend && npx nodemon --env-file=.env server.js" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "cd backend && node --env-file=.env server.js" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
